name: Idaho Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Idaho - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Dietetic Licensure Board
provider.parentOrganization: Idaho Division of Occupational and Professional Licenses (DOPL)

renewalCycle: Every 2 years (transitions from annual $60 to biennial $120 starting mid-2025)

requiredDocuments.name: Notarized Application
requiredDocuments.description: Application form with your notarized signature (if using paper form).

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Card
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

requiredDocuments.name: Official College Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Sent directly from the university showing your conferred degree (if not using CDR as sole verification).

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does an Idaho dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial license application fee is $100. A provisional license costs $50.

mainEntity.name: When does the Idaho license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Starting in mid-2025, Idaho dietitian licenses transition to a biennial (two-year) renewal cycle based on the licensee's birth year. The biennial renewal fee is $120.

mainEntity.name: Is the Dietitian Licensure Compact active in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: As of early 2026, Idaho has pending legislation (S1284) to adopt the Dietitian Licensure Compact.

mainEntity.name: Does Idaho have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Idaho. To work in Idaho, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 3 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Idaho while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
